summary.key_theme: 公司面臨嚴重的證券詐欺訴訟與非法出口晶片指控，導致市場信心崩潰，儘管 AI 伺服器需求強勁，但法律風險已成為股價的主要壓制因素。

bullish.title: Super Micro Computer Rises 5%: 3 Reasons Bulls Are Looking Past the Lawsuits
bullish.reason: 儘管面臨法律訴訟，股價仍出現 5 % 反彈，顯示部分投資人認為 AI 基礎設施的長期需求足以抵銷短期法律利空。

bullish.title: AI GPU Platforms Drive 90% of SMCI's Revenues: More Upside Ahead?
bullish.reason: 強調公司 90 % 的營收來自 AI GPU 平台，顯示其在 AI 基礎設施市場的核心競爭力與成長潛力。

bullish.title: Is Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) Among the 7 Cheapest AI Data Center Stocks to Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 將 SMCI 列為 AI 資料中心領域中估值較便宜的標的，吸引價值型投資人關注。

bearish.title: Super Micro Computer Hit With Securities Fraud Lawsuit Amid Alleged China Sales Cover-Up And Nvidia Chip Smuggling Scandal
bearish.reason: 公司面臨證券詐欺集體訴訟，且涉及非法向中國出口 Nvidia 晶片，嚴重損害公司治理形象與合規性。

bearish.title: ‘Uninvestable’ Super Micro sends investors racing to the exits
bearish.reason: 市場情緒極度惡化，分析師將其形容為「不可投資」，導致機構與散戶投資人大量拋售。

bearish.title: Reddit Sentiment on SMCI Collapsed From 82 to 12 in Three Weeks as Legal Crisis Deepens
bearish.reason: 社群媒體情緒指標大幅崩跌，反映出散戶投資人對公司法律危機的恐慌與信心喪失。

bearish.title: Could Super Micro Computer's Troubles Sink Nvidia's Stock?
bearish.reason: SMCI 的醜聞可能波及合作夥伴 Nvidia，進一步擴大市場對 AI 供應鏈穩定性的擔憂。

bearish.title: Super Micro Stock Falls On Lawsuit Alleging Undisclosed China Exposure
bearish.reason: 揭露公司隱瞞對中國市場的曝險，引發投資人對財報透明度與合規風險的質疑。

bearish.title: Supermicro Short Sellers Were Right. Is the Trade Over?
bearish.reason: 空頭部位獲利，顯示市場對公司基本面與法律風險的負面預期已持續一段時間。

bearish.title: With Super Micro Facing Challenges, Is Dell Stock a Better Buy?
bearish.reason: 由於 SMCI 的法律爭議，投資人開始轉向 Dell 等競爭對手，導致資金流出。

bearish.title: Super Micro Computer: It Deserves To Be Cheap
bearish.reason: 分析師認為目前的低估值反映了公司治理風險，短期內難以修復股價。

neutral.title: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱度觀察，未對股價未來走勢給出明確方向性建議。

neutral.title: Is Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Pricing In AI Server Growth After Recent Share Price Pullback
neutral.reason: 探討股價回調是否已反映 AI 成長預期，屬於中性的市場分析觀點。

neutral.title: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Registers a Bigger Fall Than the Market: Important Facts to Note
neutral.reason: 單純紀錄股價跌幅大於大盤，屬於事實陳述，未包含過多主觀情緒。
